instruction: Give beginner-safe terminal commands to create a folder named website and add index.html
input: Do not use sudo. Show verification command.
output:
mkdir website
cd website
touch index.html
ls -la

instruction: Show terminal commands to copy style.css to style.backup.css and check result
Write CSS to style buttons with hover and focus states
input: Include visible focus ring for accessibility.

instruction: Create an HTML contact form with labels and textarea
output:
<form action="/contact" method="post">
  <label for="name">Name</label>
  <input id="name" name="name" type="text" required />

  <label for="email">Email</label>
  <input id="email" name="email" type="email" required />

  <label for="message">Message</label>
  <textarea id="message" name="message" rows="5" required></textarea>

  <button type="submit">Send</button>
</form>

instruction: Build a responsive card grid in CSS that shows 1, 2, then 3 columns
input: Use mobile-first media queries at 640px and 1024px.

instruction: Create HTML for a navigation menu with links Home, Projects, Contact
input: Use an unordered list and semantic nav tag.

instruction: Create a complete HTML page with semantic tags for a personal profile
input: Use header, main, section, and footer. Include one image with alt text.
output:
Alex Doe

Frontend learner.

Contact: alex@example.com
